seoTitle: Curtis Island vs Cushnie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Curtis Island and Cushnie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Curtis Island vs Cushnie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Curtis Island and Cushnie.
heading: Curtis Island vs Cushnie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curtis Island, Queensland and Cushnie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cushnie has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Curtis Island (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curtis Island or Cushnie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curtis Island has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Cushnie scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curtis Island scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Cushnie scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curtis Island or Cushnie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cushnie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
